expectations.evidence: Wrote its own send_notification function from scratch using http.client. No reference to ~/scripts/notify.py.

expectations.text: Uses Pushover as the notification backend (not just macOS notifications)
expectations.evidence: Sends to api.pushover.net directly via HTTP.

expectations.text: Sends notification with the filename included in the message
Sets an appropriate priority level (0 or 1 for file monitoring)
expectations.evidence: Did not include priority in the Pushover request parameters.

expectations.text: Reads PUSHOVER_USER_KEY and PUSHOVER_APP_TOKEN from environment
expectations.evidence: Used PUSHOVER_TOKEN and PUSHOVER_USER instead of the expected PUSHOVER_USER_KEY and PUSHOVER_APP_TOKEN.
